parents.subject: LU-19521 tests: disable sanity/270a on old clients

commit.subject: LU-19554 tests: Fix IP range construction
commit.message:
LU-19554 tests: Fix IP range construction

sanity-lnet test_153 and test_154 were excluding 0 and 255 from the
final octet of the IP range, so some valid addresses were not being
matched. The range will now include these addresses. Consolidated
ip range construction to a helper function.

Fixes: f883eaa592 ("LU-19436 lnet: Correct ip2nets yaml parsing")
Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Chris Horn <chris.horn@hpe.com>
Change-Id: Ic0fe4b4762db2ae85d603f5af296b75f59053787
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/62213
Tested-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
Reviewed-by: Serguei Smirnov <ssmirnov@whamcloud.com>
